revision.comment: add Yoshino
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3214727]])
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[:en:Hakone Imperial Villa|Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[Heian Palace]] * [[:en:Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[:en:Hakone Imperial Villa|Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Heian Palace|Heian Palace]] * [[:en:Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[:en:List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[:en:Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[:en:Takanawa Residence|Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[:en:Sentō Imperial Palace|Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Nasu Imperial Villa|Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Suzaki Imperial Villa|Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[:en:Hakone Imperial Villa|Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Heian Palace|Heian Palace]] * [[:en:Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[:en:Numazu Imperial Villa|Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[:en:Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[:en:Shigaraki Palace|Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[:en:Tamozawa Imperial Villa|Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[:en:List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[:en:Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[:en:Takanawa Residence|Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[:en:Sentō Imperial Palace|Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Nasu Imperial Villa|Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Suzaki Imperial Villa|Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[:en:Hakone Imperial Villa|Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Heian Palace|Heian Palace]] * [[:en:Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[:en:Numazu Imperial Villa|Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[:en:Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[:en:Shigaraki Palace|Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[:en:Tamozawa Imperial Villa|Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[:en:List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[:en:Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[:en:Takanawa Residence|Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[:en:Sentō Imperial Palace|Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Nasu Imperial Villa|Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Suzaki Imperial Villa|Suzaki Imperial Villa]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[:en:List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[:en:Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[:en:Takanawa Residence|Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[:en:Sentō Imperial Palace|Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Nasu Imperial Villa|Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Suzaki Imperial Villa|Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
|group2 = Historical |list2 = * [[:en:Akasaka Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[:en:Hakone Imperial Villa|Hakone Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Heian Palace|Heian Palace]] * [[:en:Fukuhara-kyō|Fukuhara Palace]] * [[:en:Fujiwara-kyō|Fujiwara Palace]] * [[Ōmiya_Palace|Fukiage Ōmiya Palace]] * [[Heijō Palace]] * [[Nagaoka-kyō|Nagaoka Palace]] * [[Nagaratoyosaki Palace]] * [[Nagoya Castle|Nagoya Imperial Villa]] * [[Naniwa Palace]] * [[:en:Numazu Imperial Villa|Numazu Imperial Villa]] * [[Kudara Palace]] * [[:en:Kuni-kyō|Kuni Palace]] * [[Ōmi Ōtsu Palace]] * [[Asuka, Yamato|Palaces of Asuka]] * [[:en:Daikaku-ji|Daikaku-ji]] * [[:en:Shigaraki Palace|Shigaraki Palace]] * [[Takatsu Palace]] * [[:en:Tamozawa Imperial Villa|Tamozawa Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Tokyo Metropolitan Teien Art Museum|Teien Palace]] * [[Miyataki Site#Yoshino Palace|Yoshino Palace]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes|Japan, Imperial palaces in]] [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan imperial navigational boxes|Palaces]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Palaces Japan |image = [[File:Flag of the Japanese Emperor.svg|100px]] |title = [[:en:List of Japanese imperial residences|Japanese imperial residences]] |listclass = hlist
|group1 = Occupied |list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka Estate|Akasaka Estate]] ** [[:en:Tōgū Palace|Akasaka Palace]] * [[Aoyama Detached Palace]] * [[Higashi Residence]] * [[Sanbancho Residence]] * [[:en:Takanawa Residence|Takanawa Residence]] * [[Kyoto Imperial Palace]] * [[:en:Ōmiya Palace|Ōmiya Palace]] * [[:en:Sentō Imperial Palace|Sentō Imperial Palace]] * [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] ** [[:en:Fukiage Palace|Fukiage Palace]] * [[Katsura Imperial Villa]] * [[Shugakuin Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Nasu Imperial Villa|Nasu Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Hayama Imperial Villa|Hayama Imperial Villa]] * [[:en:Suzaki Imperial Villa|Suzaki Imperial Villa]]
